data.title: XRP Declines 2.7% Amid Late Sell-Off and Increased Volume
data.description: XRP experienced a 2.7% decrease over the past 24 hours, falling below $1.40 and stabilizing around $1.35 following a significant late sell-off. According to NS3.AI, the trading volume surged during the final-hour decline, indicating that the drop was driven by liquidation-related selling.

data.title: London Faces Housing Shortage Amid Population Growth
data.description: London's population has reached approximately nine million, yet home construction has significantly slowed. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the city's struggle to meet housing demands as its population continues to expand. The stagnation in construction is raising concerns about the availability of affordable housing options for residents. Experts suggest that policy changes and increased investment in housing infrastructure are necessary to address the growing needs of the city's inhabitants. The situation underscores the challenges faced by urban areas experiencing rapid population growth without corresponding development in housing.

data.title: Centrifuge's Tokenized Treasury Fund Receives Top Ratings from S&P Global
data.description:
Centrifuge has announced that S&P Global Ratings has upgraded the credit quality rating (FCQR) of its tokenized treasury fund, JTRSY, to 'AAAf'. According to Foresight News, the fund's volatility rating (FVR) has also been reaffirmed at 'S1+', both of which are the highest ratings under their respective methodologies.

JTRSY is built on Centrifuge and managed by Anemoy Capital and JHI Advisors. The fund's assets under management have now exceeded $1 billion.

data.title: Whale Address Awakens, Transfers and Sells Ethereum
data.description: A whale address has recently become active after a long period of dormancy. According to PANews, the address 0xd64…07ED7, which acquired 38,800 ETH through an ICO in 2015, awoke after a year of inactivity. Approximately 45 minutes ago, it transferred 18,500 ETH to another address, 0xBE4…a0c5F. Subsequently, the whale sold 9,628.54 ETH on-chain at a price of $2,049, earning $19.72 million. Further sales may be anticipated.

data.title: 3COINS to Open Largest Hong Kong Store at AIRSIDE in April
data.description: Yaichi Group has announced that Japanese lifestyle brand 3COINS will open its third and largest store in Hong Kong on April 29 at AIRSIDE in Kai Tak. According to Ming Pao, the new store will cover over 5,100 square feet and feature the city's largest pet and travel goods section. Additionally, it will introduce a 'Made in Japan' food series, making it the most comprehensive 3COINS store in terms of product variety and space in Hong Kong.

data.title: India's Revised Emissions Targets Signal Shift in Climate Strategy
data.description: India has announced new emissions targets that indicate a shift in its climate strategy, aligning with recent moves by China and the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that these changes suggest a retreat from more aggressive climate action previously anticipated. The revised goals come amid global discussions on balancing economic growth with environmental responsibilities. Observers note that this adjustment may impact international climate negotiations and efforts to curb global warming. The move reflects a broader trend among major economies reassessing their commitments in light of economic pressures and energy demands.

data.title: Whale Bets on Ceasefire Expectations Amid U.S.-Iran Negotiations
data.description:
On March 27, a whale identified as 0xebe is holding two types of hedged positions totaling approximately $40 million, according to BlockBeats. The positions appear to be a bet on oil prices declining, potentially leading to a stock market recovery, with expectations that U.S.-Iran negotiations will eventually conclude.

The whale's positions include a long position in the S&P 500 valued at $29.56 million, opened yesterday at an average price of $6,597, making it the largest long position on-chain for this asset. Additionally, there are short positions in U.S. and Brent crude oil totaling $10.2 million, with WTI crude averaging $91 and Brent crude averaging $99.

However, today's developments have taken a different turn. A new U.S. proposal has cooled negotiation expectations, with U.S. President Donald Trump offering vague statements and Iran responding firmly, leading to a prolonged stalemate that has eroded market confidence in a ceasefire. Consequently, the three major U.S. stock indices collectively closed lower, with the Nasdaq down 2.38% and the S&P 500 down 1.74%, marking the largest drop since the conflict began. Oil prices have simultaneously seen a slight increase.

As a result, the whale's positions are under pressure from both directions, with a daily floating loss exceeding $630,000.

data.title: STOCKS | ONGC Shares Rise 2.2%
data.description: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) shares have increased by 2.2%. According to Jin10, this rise in stock price reflects positive market sentiment surrounding the company. ONGC, a major player in India's energy sector, has seen its stock value climb amid broader market trends. Investors are closely monitoring the company's performance as it navigates the evolving energy landscape. The increase in share price is indicative of investor confidence in ONGC's strategic initiatives and potential growth opportunities.

data.title: DeFi Lending Model Launches to Enhance Market Solvency
data.description: Silo has introduced Silo v3, a decentralized finance (DeFi) lending model designed to maintain the solvency of money markets without the need for immediate decentralized exchange (DEX) liquidation of collateral. According to NS3.AI, this innovative design allows for the swapping of collateral into the loan asset at a discount when external liquidity is lacking, potentially offering a more stable solution for managing market liquidity challenges.

data.title: Early ETH ICO participants have begun reducing their holdings, having sold approximately $19.72 million worth of ETH.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), an address that acquired 38,800 ETH through an ICO in 2015, after remaining dormant for a year, began transferring assets 45 minutes ago. 18,500 ETH were transferred to another address, and 9,628.54 ETH were sold on-chain at approximately $2,049, for a total transaction value of approximately $19.72 million. This address currently still holds some ETH and may continue to transfer or sell them in the future.

data.title: STOCKS | Tata Motors Shares Fall 4.3% Following Jaguar Land Rover's UK Factory Shutdown Announcement
data.description: Tata Motors' passenger vehicle division experienced a 4.3% drop in stock prices after Jaguar Land Rover announced a temporary shutdown of its UK factories for up to two weeks. According to Jin10, the decision to halt production is attributed to supply chain disruptions affecting the automotive industry. The shutdown is expected to impact production schedules and delivery timelines, raising concerns among investors about potential revenue losses. Jaguar Land Rover's move reflects broader challenges faced by automakers globally as they navigate ongoing supply chain issues. The company aims to mitigate these disruptions and resume operations as soon as conditions improve.

data.title: Indonesian Stocks Experience Largest Foreign Outflow in Over 20 Years
data.description: Indonesian stocks have witnessed their most significant foreign outflow in more than two decades. Bloomberg posted on X, indicating that this trend is likely influenced by block trades in palm oil producer FAP Agri. The development comes amid increased scrutiny on ownership following MSCI's concerns about investability.

data.title: India to Hold Talks with Argentina, Indonesia, and Oman on Steel Raw Material Supply
data.description: India is set to engage in discussions with Argentina, Indonesia, and Oman next month to explore opportunities for increasing the supply of steel-making raw materials such as coking coal and iron ore, as well as acquiring related technologies. According to Jin10, these talks are expected to commence during a global steel summit scheduled for next month. The initiative aims to bolster India's steel production capabilities by securing essential resources and technological advancements from these countries.

data.title: Tether Initiates Full Audit of USDT Stablecoin with KPMG and PwC
data.description: Tether has reportedly advanced its efforts for a comprehensive audit of its $185 billion USDT stablecoin by engaging KPMG and involving PwC to prepare its systems. According to NS3.AI, this move represents Tether's most definitive step towards thorough financial scrutiny as the company plans to expand in the U.S. The completed audit aims to surpass BDO Italia's monthly attestations by thoroughly examining reserves, liabilities, internal controls, and reporting systems.

data.title: Russia's Foreign Minister Criticizes U.S. Actions in the Middle East
data.description: Russia's Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov stated on March 26 that U.S. interventions in the Middle East have exacerbated the situation, according to Jin10. Lavrov condemned U.S. officials for boasting about assassination attempts on Iranian leaders, labeling such actions as hypocritical. He highlighted that the U.S. uses military bases in Arab countries of the Persian Gulf to attack Iran, yet withdraws most of its troops from these bases, betraying its allies. Lavrov emphasized that Iran and Gulf Cooperation Council countries are suffering from the consequences of U.S. and Israeli aggression, and affirmed Russia's support for the interests of Iran and all countries in the Persian Gulf region. Regarding negotiations on the Ukraine crisis, Lavrov mentioned that Russian and U.S. leaders have the capacity to reach an agreement, but talks are hindered by the EU and NATO.

data.title: xAI Launches Subscription Plans for Grok Chatbot
data.description:
Elon Musk's AI company, xAI, has introduced a paid subscription package for its Grok chatbot, named SuperGrok. According to ChainCatcher, free and basic package users will continue to use Grok 3 but will face stricter limitations on query volume and functionality.

The SuperGrok subscription system is divided into three tiers: the entry-level SuperGrok Lite is priced at $10 per month and allows access to Grok 3.5; the standard SuperGrok costs $30 per month, which is higher than OpenAI's ChatGPT Plus and Anthropic's Claude Pro, both priced at approximately $20 per month; and the SuperGrok Heavy, aimed at intensive users, is priced at $300 per month. Additionally, xAI offers a corporate package at $30 per seat per month.

data.title: Binance Launches $100,000 USDT Campaign for MENA Users
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is launching an exclusive campaign for users in the MENA region, excluding Jordan, with $100,000 worth of USDT token vouchers available as rewards. The promotion runs from 2026-03-26 16:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-17 23:59 (UTC). Participants can earn rewards by inviting friends and family to sign up and make their first trade on Binance.

Participants can join the campaign by visiting the activity page and sharing a referral link. For each successful referral, the referrer can unlock a Reward Box containing $4 to $10 in USDT, while the referee can unlock a Reward Box containing $3 to $5 in USDT. These rewards are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Additionally, a leaderboard-based bonus rewards system offers $20,000 in USDT for the top 100 referrers who achieve the highest number of successful referrals during the promotion period.

To qualify as a successful referral, the new user must register on Binance via the referrer’s link, complete identity verification (KYC), and trade an accumulative amount of at least $10 equivalent via Binance Spot, Convert, or Futures during the promotion period. Each eligible user can unlock a maximum of 20 Reward Boxes. Certain trading pairs are excluded from the Convert task, including TUSD/USDT and FDUSD/USDT.

The campaign is open to verified users in the MENA region, excluding Jordan. Users must download and log in to the Binance App to claim the Reward Boxes. Rewards will be distributed in the form of USDT token vouchers by 30th May after the promotion ends. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who engage in dishonest or abusive activities during the promotion.

data.title: Google Compression Technology Paper Impacts Storage Stocks
data.description:
On March 27, storage concept stocks continued their downward trend following the ongoing impact of a Google compression technology paper. According to BlockBeats, Micron Technology (MU) has experienced a decline for six consecutive trading days, closing down 6.97% today, with a cumulative drop nearing 25%. SanDisk (SNDK) also closed down 11.02%, with intraday lows briefly falling below $600.

Additionally, Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that a large investor, identified as 0x61c, who shorted the stocks before the release of Google's paper on the 25th, has seen their unrealized gains increase to $250,000, achieving a return rate of 30%. The investor currently holds short positions in MU and SNDK, totaling approximately $2.98 million, with average prices of $389.2 and $673.8, respectively, and has not yet taken profits.

data.title: Singapore Plans to Establish Itself as Asia's Gold Trading Hub
data.description: Singapore announced plans on Friday to position itself as a leading gold trading center in Asia. According to Jin10, the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) and the Singapore Bullion Market Association (SBMA) have identified four key areas of focus. These include expanding the range of capital market products related to gold and establishing a reliable clearing and settlement system. Additionally, efforts will be made to enhance vault and logistics standards and explore providing vault services for foreign central banks and sovereign entities.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Eigen Labs Launches Beta Version of AgentKit for AI Development
data.description:
On March 27, Eigen Labs released the first beta version of AgentKit, a toolkit designed for developers to create AI agents capable of holding assets, making payments, managing identities, and operating autonomously online. According to BlockBeats, the initial applications of AgentKit focus on 'autonomous media agents,' which can generate content such as text, images, audio, and video, manage their social presence, and operate continuously.

In the coming weeks, Eigen Labs plans to expand AgentKit's integration with popular social platforms, introduce new agent management templates, and launch a user-friendly interface. Future versions of AgentKit will also include native support for standards like x402 and ERC-8004.
